title: ferray-numpy-interop: no complex type support in any backend
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

ferray-core supports Complex<f32> and Complex<f64>. NumPy supports complex64 and complex128. But NpElement is not implemented for complex types — the comment says 'bool and complex types require special handling and are not covered by this trait.' Arrow doesn't have native complex types but could use FixedSizeBinary or struct arrays. At minimum, NumPy interop should support complex types since both sides natively support them.
